title: Iran Lays Mines in Strait of Hormuz, Triggering U.S. Response
summary: Iran's actions in the Strait of Hormuz prompt a U.S. response, escalating tensions in a critical waterway.
charlotte_impact: Disruptions to this vital shipping lane could have severe consequences for global energy supplies and international trade.

title: U.S. at Fault in Strike on School in Iran, Preliminary Inquiry Suggests

title: Trump Claims Limited Targets Remain in Iran
summary: Trump tells Axios that there's "practically nothing left" to target in Iran, signaling a potential shift in strategy.

title: Tornado Tears Through Lake Village, Newton County: Two Dead

title: Starmer Warned of Risks in Naming Epstein’s Friend As Ambassador
